custom_voice.title: Custom Voice
custom_voice.description: Generate speech using 9 preset speaker voices.

text_input.label: Text to speak
text_input.placeholder: Enter the text you want to convert to speech...

voice_design.title: Voice Design
voice_design.description: Describe voice characteristics in text to generate matching speech. English descriptions give better results.

text_input.label: Text to speak
text_input.placeholder: Enter the text you want to convert to speech...

voice_description.label: Voice Description
voice_description.placeholder: e.g., A calm middle-aged male voice with a warm tone.
voice_description.info: Describe voice characteristics in English (other languages also work)

voice_clone.title: Voice Clone
voice_clone.description: Clone a voice from just 3 seconds of reference audio. Use clear audio with minimal background noise.
voice_clone.notice: **Note**: Voice Clone uses PyTorch CPU engine with float32 (requires more memory than MLX).

reference_text.label: Reference Audio Text
reference_text.placeholder: Enter the content spoken in the reference audio, or auto-transcribe above...
reference_text.info: Accurate text input enables higher quality cloning

text_input.label: Text to speak
text_input.placeholder: Enter the text you want the cloned voice to speak...

tips.title: Tips
items: Reference audio of **3-30 seconds** works best
Use audio recorded in a **quiet environment**
Multi-language: Japanese voice can speak English

selector.label: Preferred Engine
selector.info: AUTO: Auto-select by task. MLX: Fast & memory efficient. MPS: For Voice Clone.

estimates.title: Memory Usage Estimates
estimates.note: Quantized MLX models significantly save memory.

serena.description: Soothing female voice. Calm and relaxing.

vivian.description: Energetic female voice. Lively and bright.

aiden.description: Mature male voice. Stable and seasoned.

ryan.description: Calm male voice. Steady narration style.

eric.description: Bright male voice. Fresh and friendly.

dylan.description: Powerful male voice. Dignified and stable.

ono_anna.description: Native Japanese female voice. Natural and warm.

sohee.description: Native Korean female voice. Soft and gentle.

uncle_fu.description: Native Chinese male voice. Warm and composed.
